_note: Generic provider routing rules — operator overrides in ~/.megingjord/ai-models.json

optimizationStrategy.rule1: Prefer free/local tiers before paid cloud
optimizationStrategy.rule2: Use fleet Ollama for coding-heavy sessions when online
optimizationStrategy.rule3: Reserve premium models for complex reasoning only
optimizationStrategy.rule4: Never escalate to paid without explicit justification
optimizationStrategy.rule5: Offload availability failures to free-cloud before premium
optimizationStrategy.rule6: Use capability probe manifest for provider readiness
